entries.speaker: Janitor
entries.text: Aha! See, I knew you would make it!

entries.speaker: Janitor
entries.text: Disastrously, these rodents seem to appear without bound! There are still so many more to clean up!

entries.speaker: Janitor
entries.text: And beware! They tend to settle on lower floors, and they thus become even more perilous!

entries.speaker: Janitor
entries.text: Proceed with caution! But remember: your bravery will be rewarded plentifully!
